violations.text: Entry doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine and deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Food contact surfaces must be cleaned and sanitized. Ice machine was emptied at the time of inspection. Ice machine is not to be used until it has been cleaned, sanitized, and photo has been sent to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024

Lowboy was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. No TCS food items are to be stored in unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024
Ham and cheese were observed past the disposition 7 day mark. Food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2024

Entry doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2024

Refrigerator door gaskets at the 2 door lowboy freezer (prep unit) were observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired or replaced. -Per interview of PIC, an order has been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

The floors in the walk-in cooler #2 is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 09/08/23. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

Chicken wings and spring rolls were observed held at 46-48 degrees Fahrenheit at the low boy unit #2. Ambient temperature of the unit was observed at 46 degrees F. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. per person in charge food items were left stored overnight at the unit. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Unit was put out of service until unit reach-temperatures of 41 degrees or below. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

Ambient temperature of the Kitchen walk-in was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

The presence of insects are not controlled as evidenced by flies at the bar #1. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. pest control is active 1X month. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets at the preparation unit were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar dishwashers. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023
Some ceiling tiles are missing above the ice machine area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

The floors in the walk-in cooler #2 needs to be re-sealed. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
